title: Confirm Constant Contact sender address
label: Decision
notes: Decide which sender address and display name the membership campaign should use in Constant Contact, including where replies will go. This corresponds to the sender identity / reply handling open decisions in the Membership overview.

title: Define reply monitoring plan for membership emails
label: Decision
notes:
Decision needed: who checks the reply-to inbox, how often, what gets escalated, what gets logged, and which replies suppress later touches.

Constant Contact tracks sends, opens, clicks, bounces, and unsubscribes; human replies go to the reply-to inbox.

Restored 2026-05-07 after accidental deletion; source: Captain's Log 2026-05-05 master-portal-fund-development-triage.
